stemHtml: Which of the following statements accurately describes Jet A-1 fuel?

options.a: Jet A-1 has a freezing point of -47°C, and a flash point of +38°C.
options.b: Jet A-1 has a freezing point of -60°C, and a flash point of +38°C.
options.c: Jet A-1 has a freezing point of -47°C, and a flash point of -20°C.
options.d: Jet A-1 has a freezing point of -60°C, and a flash point of -20°C.
